name: @aily-project/board-xiao_esp32s3
description: The Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32S3 features the ESP32-S3 Xtensa LX7 dual-core processor at 240 MHz, with 8 MB Flash, Wi-Fi 802.11 b/g/n and Bluetooth 5.0 LE, 11 GPIO pins, USB-C, deep sleep as low as 14 uA, lithium battery charge management, and AI vector acceleration capabilities in the ultra-compact XIAO form factor (21x17.8 mm).
author: Seeed
